action.reasoning: Observation: DKT (h=256,l=2,d=0.3) reached test AUC 0.7547 (val peak 0.7568 at ep17), loss steadily decreased to 0.53, training ~51s for 20eps (~2.5s/epoch), pipeline solid. Analysis: Capacity still limited, val AUC plateaued late, scheduler can help refine after initial drop, larger model feasible (params <<1B). Decision: Incrementally update train.py only - set h=512/l=3/d=0.2/bs=64/epochs=30, add ReduceLROnPlateau (mode=max, patience=4), lr=5e-4; this should push AUC higher without changing model/predict.py structure or exceeding time (~75s/iter).
